('BEING_SERVICED','FREE','ON_A_TRIP'), primary key (car_id) ) Hibernate: create table car ( car_year integer, car_id bigint generated by default as identity, car_brand varchar(255), car_model varchar(255), car_registration_number varchar(255) unique, car_status enum ('BEING_SERVICED','FREE','ON_A_TRIP'), primary key (car_id) ) 2026-04-08T20:06:51.892+05:00 DEBUG 5020 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table drive ( car_id bigint, drive_id bigint generated by default as identity, end_rental timestamp(6), start_rental timestamp(6), tariff_id bigint, total_amount bigint, total_distance bigint, user_id bigint, drive_status enum ('ACTIVE','CANCELLED','COMPLETED','PENDING_PAYMENT'), primary key (drive_id) ) Hibernate: create table drive ( car_id bigint, drive_id bigint generated by default as identity, end_rental timestamp(6), start_rental timestamp(6), tariff_id bigint, total_amount bigint, total_distance bigint, user_id bigint, drive_status enum payment_amount bigint, payment_date timestamp(6), payment_id bigint generated by default as identity, payment_method enum ('CARD','CASH'), payment_status enum ('PENDING','SUCCESS'), primary key (payment_id) ) Hibernate: create table payment ( drive_id bigint unique, payment_amount bigint, payment_date timestamp(6), payment_id bigint generated by default as identity, payment_method enum
